Disprin (Aspirin) — Uses, Dosage and Side Effects in Pakistan

Disprin (aspirin) is Pakistan's classic headache medicine and a blood thinner for heart patients. But it must NEVER be given to children, dengue patients or those with ulcers. Learn safe use guidelines...
